DP.056.0000:
I’m going to be a Sailor like my
daddy!\f
He’s a real man among men!
Even the sea doesn’t scare him!\f
Oh, but a Gym Leader’d be cool, too!
Byron is so awesome!
DP.056.0001:
The little boy is thrashing about
in his sleep.\f
He appears to be in torment...
He is muttering something...\f
“DAR...
DARK...is watching...me...”
DP.056.0002:
The little boy is thrashing about
in his sleep.\f
[0103,0000]’s Lunar Wing began
to glow...\f
The boy’s sleeping face became
untroubled and serene!\f
DP.056.0004:
I couldn’t wake up...
I saw it...\f
It was a scary dream...
It was a dark place...\r
And there was a dark Pokémon...\f
But, Daddy, Mommy...
I could always hear your voices...
DP.056.0005:
Oh, my gosh!
You’re awake!\f
Oh, my son...
I... I don’t know what to say...\f
DP.056.0006:
Thank you!
We’ll never forget you!\f
DP.056.0007:
Seeing you back to normal makes
me feel great!\f
I’ve regained my spirit as a Sailor!
Come sail with me later!\f
DP.056.0008:
Our boy has too much energy!
I wish he’d be a little quieter.
DP.056.0009:
I never thought our boy would fall
into this endless nightmare...\f
It’s happened in the past in
Canalave...\f
There were people who never woke
up from their nightmares...
DP.056.0010:
Thank you! We can’t thank you
enough, but thank you!
